title: Misato slapping Ritsuko in 20
wikitext:
[]: Misato slapping Ritsuko in 2.0 Post by Misato's toyboy » Sat Jul 18, 2009 5:57 pm In the trailer from 1.01, Misato slaps Ritsuko. Is the scenario same as TV, or a new one in 2.0?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 18, 2009 5:58 pm In the final movie, Ritsuko isn't slapped. They just argue in a corridor prior to the Sahaquiel operation. It's a replacement for their scene in the lady's bathroom in 12.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jul 18, 2009 6:34 pm Nothing shown in the trailer happens exactly that way in 2.0. Watch the trailer at the end of the televised version of 1.01 for the "true" version of events.

[]: Post by Heromaster111 » Sat Jul 18, 2009 7:30 pm Wouldn't said scene from 1.0 trailer be the scene in 16 when Misato and Ritsuko are arguing over what to do to get Shinji/Yui out of Leliel, judging from the setting etc?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jul 18, 2009 7:41 pm Not necessarily. The settings and timings for several things were changed.

[]: Post by Heromaster111 » Sat Jul 18, 2009 7:43 pm are you refering to the updated preview?

[]: Post by bladerj » Sat Jul 18, 2009 7:44 pm whos to say it wont be included in 2.02 ?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sat Jul 18, 2009 9:13 pm im pretty sure that scene happened following Shinji gettting eaten alive with unit 01 into leliel......My fav angel.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Jul 19, 2009 1:59 am NAveryW wrote: Not necessarily. The settings and timings for several things were changed.

[]: Post by Misato's toyboy » Sun Jul 19, 2009 8:06 am Heromaster111 wrote: are you refering to the updated preview?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 19, 2009 9:54 am Misato's toyboy wrote: Didn't know there was one. I'm going by the DVD trailer.
